system.description:
### Tier 1 Standard Disciplined and well-equipped mercenaries, known for their blue armor and use of illegal technology. Motives & Tactics: Mercenary Tactics +2

#### Features Concussive Shot - Action: Mark 1 Stress to fire a concussive shot at a target within close range. If the attack is successful, the target is knocked back to Close range and, if it hits a solid surface, becomes Vulnerable.

Shield Disruption - Passive: The Trooper uses disruptor ammunition. If the Trooper's attack hits a target that still has active shield slots, it deals +2 damage.

Tactical Retreat - Reaction: When the Trooper takes damage, it can immediately move to a cover area within Close range.

}}

{{adversary,
